attempts.summary: Queried sec_analytics dns-tunnel detector for 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-20 and validated via ad-hoc OpenSearch query. One internal IP 10.0.2.45 showed classic tunneling indicators to data-corp.io with many unique subdomains and high TXT ratio.

answer.evidence: 1538 DNS queries to data-corp.io with ~1500 unique random subdomains; 73% TXT responses.
